title: juncus lateriflorus
intro: Juncus lateriflorus, also known as variegated rush or siduced rush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Juncaceae family. Native to North America, its roots and stems are used in traditional medicine, boasting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Juncus lateriflorus include its ability to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and antispasmodic properties. Herbal preparations of Juncus lateriflorus include decoctions, infusions, and poultices, often used to ease pain and reduce inflammation.
